# Seminar 3

In this seminar, we focus on old exam problems relevant for modules 4 and 5. We will likely not have time to go through solutions to all of them.

- Problem 2, Retake exam 2025.
- Problem 4, Retake exam 2025.
- Problem 4, Trial exam 2025. 
- Problem 4, Ordinary exam 2025. 
- Problem 5, Ordinary exam 2025. 
- Problem 5, Retake exam 2025.
- Problem 3, Trial exam 2025.
